channel.title: flove making-of — install questions
channel.description: New install design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: Should flove have an installable PWA button?
item.description:
• Yes, in-app button — Custom 'Install flove' button using beforeinstallprompt. More discoverable, more code. • No, browser-only — Rely on browser's install prompt. Simpler, less discoverable. • Defer — Don't implement yet — revisit after core apps ship.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Defer
